response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances. For the first song, 'Break It Down', I observed text indicating 'Vestia Zeta' as the primary credit, and two performers in the video. For the second song, 'SUPER DUPER', I identified it as a song by the group ReGLOSS, with composer credits to OHTORA and New K visible in the background. I searched for both, but definitive full-text lyrics were not immediately extractable within the constraints, so I set the lyrics fields to null.
response.global_summary: A two-song musical medley performed by VTubers, including 'Break It Down' by Vestia Zeta (with Kaela Kovalskia) and 'SUPER DUPER' by ReGLOSS.

scenes.description: Vestia Zeta and Kaela Kovalskia perform 'Break It Down' on a stage. Text at the top and bottom displays the song title and Vestia Zeta's name.
Four members of ReGLOSS perform 'SUPER DUPER' on a stage with a ferris wheel background. The song title 'SUPER DUPER' is displayed.
